notes: Run 2026-06-28. Mechanics: anagram (5) + homophone (5). Rotation: prior run used crossword + rhyme_time; run before that used initials + before_after. Anagram answers: Stop, Crate, Retina, Tinsel, Singers. Homophone answers: Knot, Ring, Veil, Mourning, Mantle.
